untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'upside gap with post-gap buildup' and 'sharp correction severity' - gap detection and buildup pattern recognition are not available in the allowed indicator set. These require bar-by-bar gap analysis and multi-bar pattern matching beyond single-bar comparisons.
translation_notes: Translated core logic: higher timeframe trend direction (via SMA_50 regime), sharp short-term reversal (via RSI extremes indicating overdone moves), and reversal alignment with trend. Used RSI <40 for LONG (oversold after sharp down correction) and RSI >60 for SHORT (overbought after sharp up correction). Entry window constraint and gap/buildup patterns cannot be expressed with available indicators. Exit conditions set as reversal of RSI extremes since author provided no guidance.
